storyLeadQuote: Replace this with a meaningful quote or the first words you said to each other.
storyBody: Tell the story of how you met — where it happened, what you noticed first, and what made you want to see each other again.
Describe the moment you knew this was something special. A favourite date, a trip together, or a quiet evening that changed everything.
Share what your journey has been like since then and what you're most looking forward to as you start this new chapter together.
quoteText: Add a favourite quote, Bible verse, song lyric, or something meaningful to both of you.
featuredPhotoCaption: Add a caption for your favourite photo together
letterBody: Write a personal note to your guests here. Thank them for being part of your lives and share how much it means to celebrate this day with them.
You can add as many paragraphs as you like — tell them what to expect, share your excitement, or simply express your gratitude.
letterClosing: With all our love, Meron & Adiam
giftSubheading: Your love and support mean the world to us. If you wish to honour us with a gift, a contribution to our future together would be greatly appreciated.
giftNote: Replace with your e-transfer email or payment link details
